revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岩屋古墳]]
'''Iwaya Kofun''' (岩屋古墳) refers to multiple kofun (ancient Kofuns) across Japan with the same name.
* {{ill|Azuma Iwaya Kofun|ja|吾妻岩屋古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuma Iwaya Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579302|1=Azuma Iwaya Kofun}} - {{ill|Mibu, Tochigi|en|Mibu, Tochigi|qid=Q1354910|lt=Mibu|1=Mibu, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Shimotsuga District, Tochigi|en|Shimotsuga District, Tochigi|qid=Q1202834|lt=Shimo-tsuga District|1=Shimotsuga District, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}} (National Historic Site, also called Azuma Kofun). * {{ill|Ryūkakuji Iwaya Kofun|lt=Ryūkakuji Iwaya Kofun|lt=Ryūkaku-ji Iwaya Kofun|ja|龍角寺岩屋古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūkaku-ji Iwaya Kofun|qq=}} - {{ill|Sakae, Chiba|en|Sakae, Chiba|qid=Q1202754|lt=Sakae, Chiba|1=Sakae, Chiba}}, {{ill|Inba District|en|Inba District|qid=Q677245|lt=Inba District|1=Inba District}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}} (National Historic Site, part of the Ryūkaku-ji Kofun Group). * {{ill|Iwaya Kofun (Omitama)|ja|岩屋古墳 (小美玉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Kofun (Omitama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579303|1=Iwaya Kofun (Omitama)}} - {{ill|Omitama|en|Omitama|qid=Q430584|lt=Omitama|1=Omitama}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Iwaya Kofun (Komaki)|ja|岩屋古墳 (小牧市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Kofun (Komaki)|qq=}} - {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|qid=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}, Iwasaki area. * {{ill|Iwaya Kofun (Ryūō)|ja|岩屋古墳 (竜王町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Kofun (Ryūō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579304|1=Iwaya Kofun (Ryūō)}} - {{ill|Ryūō, Shiga|en|Ryūō, Shiga|qid=Q1087560|lt=Ryūō|1=Ryūō, Shiga}}, {{ill|Gamō District, Shiga|en|Gamō District, Shiga|qid=Q931658|lt=Gamo District|1=Gamō District, Shiga}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, Yakushi area. * {{ill|Kanazuka Kofun|lt=Kanazuka Kofun|lt=Hirata Iwaya Kofun|ja|平田岩屋古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirata Iwaya Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to カナヅカ古墳}} - {{ill|Asuka, Nara|en|Asuka, Nara|qid=Q752397|lt=Asuka, Nara|1=Asuka, Nara}}, {{ill|Takaichi District, Nara|en|Takaichi District, Nara|qid=Q1117901|lt=Takaichi District|1=Takaichi District, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}} (a subsidiary tomb of Umenoyama Kofun). * {{ill|Asakuma Iwaya Kofun|ja|朝酌岩屋古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asakuma Iwaya Kofun|1=Asakumi Iwaya Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q133947461}} - {{ill|Matsue|en|Matsue|qid=Q207321|lt=Matsue|1=Matsue}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}, Asakuma Town. * {{ill|Idekamiiwa Kofun (Kotoura)|lt=Idekamiiwa Kofun (Kotoura)|lt=Dejō Iwaya Kofun|ja|出上岩屋古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dejō Iwaya Kofun|qq=}} - {{ill|Kotoura, Tottori|en|Kotoura, Tottori|qid=Q1204853|lt=Kotoura, Tottori|1=Kotoura, Tottori}}, {{ill|Tōhaku District|en|Tōhaku District|qid=Q1131949|lt=Tōhaku District|1=Tōhaku District}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|qid=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture|1=Tottori Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Iwaya Kofun (Yonago)|ja|岩屋古墳 (米子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Kofun (Yonago)|qq=}} - {{ill|Yonago|en|Yonago|qid=Q320964|lt=Yonago|1=Yonago}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|qid=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture|1=Tottori Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Iwaya Kofun (Hikari)|ja|岩屋古墳 (光市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Kofun (Hikari)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579305|1=Iwaya Kofun (Hikari)}} - {{ill|Hikari, Yamaguchi|en|Hikari, Yamaguchi|qid=Q823502|lt=Hikari, Yamaguchi|1=Hikari, Yamaguchi}}, {{ill|Yamaguchi Prefecture|en|Yamaguchi Prefecture|qid=Q127264|lt=Yamaguchi Prefecture|1=Yamaguchi Prefecture}}, Murozumi Iwaya area. * {{ill|Iwaya Kofun (Itoda)|ja|岩屋古墳 (糸田町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Kofun (Itoda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579306|1=Iwaya Kofun (Itoda)}} - {{ill|Itoda, Fukuoka|en|Itoda, Fukuoka|qid=Q1208544|lt=Itoda|1=Itoda, Fukuoka}}, {{ill|Tagawa District, Fukuoka|en|Tagawa District, Fukuoka|qid=Q1156353|lt=Tagawa District|1=Tagawa District, Fukuoka}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}.
